title: Introducing the pkg.go.dev API
summary: Introducing the new programmatic API for pkg.go.dev, allowing developers to fetch package and module data directly.
author: Ethan Lee, Hana Kim, and Jonathan Amsterdam

title: Type Construction and Cycle Detection
summary: Go 1.26 simplifies type construction and enhances cycle detection for certain kinds of recursive types.
author: Mark Freeman

title: //go:fix inline and the source-level inliner
summary: How Go 1.26's source-level inliner works, and how it can help you with self-service API migrations.
author: Alan Donovan

title: Allocating on the Stack
summary: A description of some of the recent changes to do allocations on the stack instead of the heap.
author: Keith Randall

title: Using go fix to modernize Go code
summary: Go 1.26 includes a new implementation of go fix that can help you use more modern features of Go.
author: Alan Donovan

title: Go 1.26 is released
summary: Go 1.26 adds a new garbage collector, cgo overhead reduction, experimental simd/archsimd package, experimental runtime/secret package, and more.
author: Carlos Amedee, on behalf of the Go team

title: Results from the 2025 Go Developer Survey
summary: The 2025 Go Developer Survey results, focused on developer sentiment towards Go, use cases, challenges, and developer environments.
author: Todd Kulesza, on behalf of the Go team

title: Go’s Sweet 16
author: Austin Clements, for the Go team

title: The Green Tea Garbage Collector
summary: Go 1.25 includes a new experimental garbage collector, Green Tea.
author: Michael Knyszek and Austin Clements

title: Flight Recorder in Go 1.25
summary: Go 1.25 introduces a new tool in the diagnostic toolbox, flight recording.
author: Carlos Amedee and Michael Knyszek
